title: Quest 35950 Two Slice Deep Fill Waffle Maker/Non-Stick Hot Plates/Adjustable Temperature/Stainless Steel with Cool Touch Handle / 1000W
features: DOUBLE WAFFLE MAKER – This two-slice waffle maker allows you to whip up a batch of delicious waffles in an instant! Simply place the pre-prepared batter into the two separate moulds and close the lid to begin the cooking process.

EASY CLEAN – This Belgian waffle maker utilises 1000W of power, and is super simple to clean thanks to the non-stick hot plates. Once the cooking process is over just let the plates cool down then wipe them clean with a damp cloth.

WAFFLES YOUR WAY – The adjustable temperature gauge on this waffle maker machine allows you to create delicious waffles exactly to your liking. You’ll know when the machine is ready to be used thanks to the power and ready light indicators on top of the machine.

COOL TOUCH HANDLE – The waffle maker features a cool touch handle that makes the opening and closing of the lid nice and safe during use. The machine will also stay safely secured to the work surface thanks to the non-slip rubber feet at the base of the unit.

QUEST APPLIANCES - Quest are the leading manufacturer of cooking appliances ideal for giving you a helping hand in the kitchen. From omelette makers & waffle makers, to teppanyaki grills & air fryers, visit the Quest store on Amazon to view the whole range.
description: Product Description Previous page Indicator Lights Each unit features power and ready indicator lights, so you know when to start & finish cooking. Deep Fill Moulds Enjoy thick, fluffy waffles, as the waffle moulds' designs allow for a deep filling of mixture. Cool Touch Handle Safely open the waffle makers at any time, as they both feature a cool touch handle on their lids. Non-Stick Plates No oils or fats are needed for the cooking process, as the plates are non-stick and easily cleaned. Easy Controls Adjust the temperature gauge located on the front to ensure you get your waffles cooked perfectly.
